allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/cwefayzuzyjdfnkuhicu/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_4676ca27b1b681f14f58efb982b4ae35a34fc185" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""UPDATE budget_items SET month = to_char\(now\(\), ''''YYYY-MM''''\) WHERE month IS NULL;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/cwefayzuzyjdfnkuhicu/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_4676ca27b1b681f14f58efb982b4ae35a34fc185" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""ALTER TABLE budget_items ALTER COLUMN month SET NOT NULL;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/cwefayzuzyjdfnkuhicu/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_4676ca27b1b681f14f58efb982b4ae35a34fc185" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE account_goals \(id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\) PRIMARY KEY, user_id uuid REFERENCES auth.users\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL DEFAULT auth.uid\(\), account_id uuid REFERENCES accounts\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL, goal_type text NOT NULL CHECK \(goal_type IN \(''''balance'''', ''''category''''\)\), category_id uuid REFERENCES categories\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE, target_amount numeric NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, target_date date, created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)\);""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/cwefayzuzyjdfnkuhicu/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_4676ca27b1b681f14f58efb982b4ae35a34fc185" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""ALTER TABLE account_goals ADD CONSTRAINT category_goal_needs_category CHECK \(goal_type != ''''category'''' OR category_id IS NOT NULL\);""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/cwefayzuzyjdfnkuhicu/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_4676ca27b1b681f14f58efb982b4ae35a34fc185" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-raw '{""query"": ""ALTER TABLE account_goals ADD CONSTRAINT category_goal_needs_category CHECK \(goal_type != '"''"'category'"''"' OR category_id IS NOT NULL\);""}')
Bash(printf '{""query"": ""ALTER TABLE account_goals ADD CONSTRAINT category_goal_needs_category CHECK \(goal_type != %ccategory%c OR category_id IS NOT NULL\);""}' "''" "''")
